commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=073689112ba50fd0d73b341d8b5ce31ff040a897)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-disabled `core/doctor/workspace-status` Doctor lint check that converts existing workspace plugin/status and TaskFlow diagnostics into structured health findings.

PR surface: Source +121, Tests +167. Total +288 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: `doctor --lint` forwards `--allow-exec` into the lint context, while the PR-head workspace-status detect path calls daemon drift collection without that option. I did not run commands because this review had to keep the checkout read-only and artifact-free.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This draft maintainer-labeled PR needs contributor real behavior proof before merge, and automation cannot provide the contributor's positive setup proof for them.

target.title: Doctor: expose workspace status findings
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds `core/doctor/workspace-status` as a structured Doctor lint finding source.
- Exposes existing workspace-status diagnostics for plugin version drift, plugin compatibility warnings, plugin diagnostics, and TaskFlow recovery hints.
- Keeps the check opt-in/default-off with `defaultEnabled: false`, so plain `doctor --lint` behavior is unchanged.
- Leaves legacy `openclaw doctor` workspace status notes and all real repair behavior unchanged.
- Wires structured lint to the same gated daemon-context `pluginVersionDrift` source used by legacy Doctor output.

## Contract / Safety
- No plugin SDK/public contract changes.
- No config schema, plugin manifest, or persisted data-model changes.
- No new repair path; this is read-only structured detection only.
- Default `openclaw doctor --lint` does not run `core/doctor/workspace-status`; use `--only core/doctor/workspace-status` or `--all` to include it.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
Default-disabled structured Doctor lint for workspace status, including selected-lint plugin/status findings and the daemon-context plugin-version-drift path ClawSweeper flagged.

Real environment tested:
WSL2 Ubuntu 24.04 source checkout at `073689112ba50fd0d73b341d8b5ce31ff040a897`. Positive plugin-version-drift proof uses the existing source test harness with mocked daemon-status metadata so it can prove the selected lint check receives the same gated `pluginVersionDrift` report as the legacy Doctor path without requiring a live mismatched Gateway. Source CLI zero/default-off proof was run with isolated config/state before this fix and remains applicable to the unchanged default-off behavior.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
2. `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts`
3. `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts`
4. `pnpm tsgo:core`
5. `pnpm plugin-sdk:surface:check`
6. `pnpm plugin-sdk:check-exports`
7. `git diff --check`

Evidence after fix:

```text
✓ doctor health contributions > keeps workspace status opt-in for structured lint selection
  - default lint: checksRun=0, checksSkipped=1
  - selected lint: checksRun=1, checksSkipped=0
  - collectWorkspaceStatusHealthFindings called with { pluginVersionDrift }

✓ doctor health contributions > passes daemon-context plugin drift into the workspace status note
✓ doctor health contributions > omits daemon-context plugin drift when gateway version used the fallback
✓ doctor health contributions > omits daemon-context plugin drift when probe auth was skipped
✓ doctor health contributions > skips daemon-context plugin drift probes for remote gateway mode

✓ noteWorkspaceStatus > collects plugin version drift as structured findings
✓ noteWorkspaceStatus > surfaces active official managed plugin version drift

Test Files 2 passed
Tests 64 passed
```

Prior source CLI proof for the selected/default-off behavior:

```text
pnpm openclaw doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/workspace-status
exit=0, checksRun=1, checksSkipped=32, findings=0

pnpm openclaw doctor --lint --json
workspaceFindings=0; nonzero exit came from unrelated default checks in the isolated config
```

Observed result after fix:
The selected structured lint check now calls the workspace-status collector with the daemon-context `pluginVersionDrift` report when the same gated legacy conditions are met. Default lint still skips `core/doctor/workspace-status`, remote Gateway mode still avoids local daemon drift probes, and auth-warning/fallback-version cases still suppress drift.

What was not tested:
A live Gateway/plugin-version mismatch environment was not exercised. The positive drift path is covered by source harness proof using mocked daemon-status metadata, plus source CLI proof for selection/default-off behavior.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (2 shards, 64 tests)
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.ts src/commands/doctor-workspace-status.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:surface:check`
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:check-exports`
- `git diff --check`

## Not Tested
- Packaged installer/runtime proof.
- Live Gateway/plugin-version mismatch proof; positive drift is covered with source harness metadata and selected/default-off source CLI proof.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
